title: brassica nigra var. torulosa
intro: Brassica nigra var. torulosa, also known as Black Mustard, is a plant species within the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, black seeds and pungent foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Black Mustard include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Black Mustard seeds are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into various traditional remedies.
